title: Chunk Tweaks
description: Better chunk fog rendering and customizable fade in animations
body:
**This resourcepack requires the snapshot version 25w44a or anything above such as release 1.21.11 of Minecraft to run**

This resourcepack uses shaders to change and improve some small things about chunk rendering 

Firstly, it adds transparency using dithering to chunks, especially at the fog transition. This allows the chunks to fade into the fog completely and not just changing color.

In Addition, it adds better animations to chunks while fading into view to make the transition less harsh. There are multiple effects like transparency, movement and sclae available. Each of them can be easily customized and layered ontop of the other ones to create even better animations!

The config can be found at *assets/minecraft/shaders/include/chunk_effects.glsl*
